basic.description:
{Mysticism — Basic [WOG]}

+3 SP/day (base 1 + WOG +2). Stacks with natural recovery.

advanced.description:
{Mysticism — Advanced [WOG]}

+5 SP/day (base 2 + WOG +3). Stacks with natural recovery.

expert.description:
{Mysticism — Expert [WOG]}

+8 SP/day (base 3 + WOG +5). Full regeneration over days.

basic.description:
{Eagle Eye — Basic [WOG]}

50% to learn enemy spells up to level 3 (was 40%, max lvl 2).

advanced.description:
{Eagle Eye — Advanced [WOG]}

65% to learn enemy spells up to level 4 (was 50%, max lvl 3).

expert.description:
{Eagle Eye — Expert [WOG]}

80% to learn enemy spells up to level 5 (was 60%, max lvl 4).

basic.description:
{Tactics — Basic [WOG]}

Deploy in 3-hex zone (was 2). Enemy cannot pass.

advanced.description:
{Tactics — Advanced [WOG]}

Deploy in 5-hex zone (was 4). Enemy cannot pass.

expert.description:
{Tactics — Expert [WOG]}

Deploy in 7-hex zone (was 6). Near-full battlefield control.

basic.description:
{Scholar — Basic [WOG]}

Share spells up to level 3 (was 2).

advanced.description:
{Scholar — Advanced [WOG]}

Share spells up to level 4 (was 3).

expert.description:
{Scholar — Expert [WOG]}

Share spells up to level 5 — any spell can be taught.

{Pathfinding — Expert [WOG]}

Rough terrain penalty -75% (was -75%). All terrain accessible.

basic.description:
{Luck — Basic [WOG]}

+1 Luck. Lucky hits deal +50% extra damage (total ~3× normal).

advanced.description:
{Luck — Advanced [WOG]}

+2 Luck. Lucky hits deal +50% extra damage (total ~3× normal).

expert.description:
{Luck — Expert [WOG]}

+3 Luck. Lucky hits deal +50% extra damage (total ~3× normal).

basic.description:
{Artillery — Basic [WOG Enhanced]}

Hero controls ballista. 50% double-damage chance. Attacks twice per round.

advanced.description:
{Artillery — Advanced [WOG Enhanced]}

Hero controls ballista. 75% double-damage chance. Attacks twice per round.

expert.description:
{Artillery — Expert [WOG Enhanced]}

Hero controls ballista. 100% double-damage. Attacks three times per round.

basic.description:
{First Aid — Basic [WOG Enhanced]}

Hero controls First Aid Tent. Heals up to 100 HP per turn (was 50).

advanced.description:
{First Aid — Advanced [WOG Enhanced]}

Hero controls First Aid Tent. Heals up to 150 HP per turn (was 75).

expert.description:
{First Aid — Expert [WOG Enhanced]}

Hero controls First Aid Tent. Heals up to 200 HP per turn (was 100). Can revive fallen units.
